summary: The two prior blockers are resolved. Lighthouse CI now writes reports locally to the filesystem at .lighthouseci, and AJV/Zod are declared as direct devDependencies rather than production dependencies. No new blocker was found in the staged blocker-fix scope.
recommended_followups: Keep generated Lighthouse, Playwright, and test result directories untracked; current .gitignore/.dockerignore coverage is appropriate.
Before committing, consider whether the staged .forge review/step-plan deletions are intentional, since they are outside the Step 1 product-code scope.
